markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on content strategy and processes for The Adventures Group's collaboration with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The Adventures Group aims for 20% year-over-year growth, with organic traffic playing a crucial role, especially for Cancun](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Content creation will start slow, focusing on quality and alignment, then ramp up as processes are refined](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Technical SEO and website structure improvements are ongoing, with plans to enhance blog categorization and tagging](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Collaboration on content ideation, creation, and approval processes will be key to overcoming potential bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Growth Goals

  - [The Adventures Group operates in three destinations: Puerto Vallarta, Cabo, and Cancun](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [2025 goal: 20% year-over-year growth (achievable based on past performance)](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Cancun is the most challenging market due to strong competition (e.g., Xcaret)](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Organic traffic is particularly important for Cancun (74% of visitors)](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

### Customer Demographics and Booking Patterns

  - [Majority of customers are couples/adults (25-45 years old) with high income](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=2950.0)
  - [Families make up a smaller portion (e.g., 18% for dolphin programs in Cabo)](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=2907.0)
  - [Booking windows vary: Cabo \~17 days, research starts 1-2 months before trip](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=3997.0)
  - [90% of revenue from English-speaking audience, but significant Mexican traffic](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Content Strategy and Opportunities

  - [Focus on becoming the "source of truth" for destination information](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=5197.0)
  - [Expand content beyond tour descriptions (e.g., restaurant guides, itineraries)](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=5226.0)
  - [Create content linking all three destinations to boost overall traffic](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=5400.0)
  - [Explore interactive content ideas (e.g., quizzes, trip planners)](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=5505.0)

### Technical SEO and Website Structure

  - [Recent migration to GA4 has caused tracking issues; working on fixing analytics](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Using SEMrush and Ahrefs for technical SEO monitoring and backlink analysis](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=5724.0)
  - [Plans to improve blog structure with better categorization and tagging](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=5735.0)
  - [IT team can develop new functionalities, but there may be timeline constraints](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=5467.0)

### Content Creation and Approval Process

  - [Start with a small volume of articles to refine the process](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [English content created first, then translated to Spanish](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=4376.0)
  - [Need for a dedicated team member to review content for accuracy and local nuances](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=4552.0)
  - [Photo selection process to be streamlined, possibly using AI for tagging and categorization](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=4624.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to conduct deep research and analysis during the holiday break](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=6201.0)
  - [Schedule a 1-hour follow-up meeting in early January (week of Jan 8th) to review research findings and proposed content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=6201.0)
  - [Establish a weekly meeting cadence, preferably on Wednesdays](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=6000.0)
  - [The Adventures Group to provide access to SEMrush and Ahrefs accounts for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=5724.0)
  - [Continue discussions in Slack for any immediate questions or clarifications](https://fathom.video/share/WoDJxFjtjzLFWfFPtCsJTPkggaUx6Z-A?tab=summary&timestamp=6181.0)
